message:
perf(test262): implement parallel test execution and fix Node/Bun compatibility

- Add thread pool with atomic work queue for parallel test execution
- Make temp_counter thread-safe using std.atomic.Value
- Fix process.exit() safety check in Node/Bun polyfill
- Node.js: 771s → 222s (3.5x faster with --threads=8)
- Bun: 387s → 139s (2.8x faster with --threads=8)

Results with parallel execution:
- EdgeBox: 138s (fastest) 🏆
- Bun: 139s
- QuickJS: 153s
- Node.js: 222s
